title: delosperma mahonii
intro: Delosperma mahonii, commonly known as the yellow vygie or yellow daisy, is a succulent plant species native to South Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Delosperma mahonii include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
